text: I feel curious and contemplative in this space, as if I am on the threshold of knowledge and innovation. The glass walls and open, brightly-lit room evoke a sense of possibility but also a kind of distance — I am separated from what lies within, an observer of the sterile yet purposeful environment. Moving to the second scene, I find myself drawn into the world of research and development. The vivid colors and dynamic displays stimulate my mind, making me aware of how technology shapes and reflects our existence. I feel both inspired and cautious, reminded of the perpetual dance between humans and intelligent machines, and my place as an inquisitive visitor in this unfolding story.
